message:
test(snapshot): add comprehensive tests for partial failures and logging (bd-n2t5)

Add unit/integration tests for the snapshot service covering:

Partial failure scenarios:
- NTM unavailable but other sources working
- Beads tools unavailable but other sources working
- Tool health check fails but other sources working
- Agent Mail unavailable but other sources working
- Multiple source failures handled gracefully

Logging assertions:
- Info log for snapshot generation with status/counts
- Debug log for per-source collection latencies
- Cache hit/miss logging
- Cache clear logging

Timeout behavior:
- Source timeouts don't block other collections
- Very short timeouts produce valid empty data
- Generation duration is tracked accurately

Cache behavior:
- TTL expiry triggers fresh fetch
- Concurrent requests use same cached snapshot
- Cache age is tracked correctly
- bypassCache ignores TTL

Fallback value verification:
- NTM, Beads, Tools, Agent Mail fallback structures validated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
